description: Minor rear-end collision at traffic light. Bumper dented, no airbag deployment.
decision_rationale: Low value, clear photos, no fraud indicators.

description: Driver-side door scratched while parking in a mall basement.
Front-end collision with another vehicle at an intersection. Hood and grille damaged.
Vehicle keyed along passenger side overnight in residential parking.
decision_rationale: FIR filed, photos show fresh scratch pattern consistent with vandalism.

description: Side-impact collision damaging rear passenger door and quarter panel of BMW 3 Series.
decision_rationale: High-value but legitimate. OEM parts justified by luxury cover.

description: Front bumper minor crack from low-speed parking lot incident.
Hail damage to roof and hood during monsoon storm. Multiple dents.
decision_rationale: Weather event verified via IMD records.

description: Severe front-end damage. Claimant alleges single-vehicle collision with tree at night.
decision_rationale: Photos showed damage inconsistent with the described event; paint scrape suggested another vehicle. Investigation found prior claim 4 months earlier on similar damage.

description: Claimed total-loss collision but no police report, no witnesses, vehicle moved before assessment.
decision_rationale: Pattern matched known staged-collision template. SIU escalation confirmed fraud.

description: Vehicle reportedly stolen from open street, no FIR filed for 5 days.
decision_rationale: Late FIR filing and inconsistent witness statements. Pattern flag.

description: Rear bumper crack and dent from low-speed impact while reversing.
decision_rationale: Routine cosmetic repair. Repair invoice verified.

description: Front passenger side fender and headlight damaged in lane-change collision.
decision_rationale: Both parties' accounts matched. Photos consistent.

description: Driver-side mirror broken in parking incident. Replacement only.
Multi-panel damage from intersection collision. Claimant's third claim in 14 months.
decision_rationale: Approved after manual review — incident verified despite claim frequency flag.
Policy was suspended at time of incident due to non-payment.
